title: synotis alata
intro: Synotis alata, also known as the winged synotis or synotis winged, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia, and has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. The herbal preparations of Synotis alata include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections.
